name: ASRock H810M-X Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-6400 - 1x M.2 Slot - 1x M.2 Socket (Key E) - USB 3.2 Gen1 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C (Front) - D-Sub - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5GbE LAN
shortName: ASRock H810M-X Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 4.0
description: Budget Intel Micro-ATX motherboard with LGA 1851 socket and H810 chipset for entry-level systems.
